blockingIssues.description: LOC gate was relaxed to <=550 in tests/transitions-consolidation.test.ts, allowing execution.ts to exceed the feature's <=500 fallback acceptance bound.
toArchiveTimestamp in src/runtime/util.ts regresses non-millisecond ISO handling by leaving trailing 'Z' (e.g. 2025-04-05T19:42:13Z -> 20250405T194213Z).
selectPlanFeatures path mutates caller input via shared execution object references after clone reduction (prepareDraftPlanEdit + clearExecution).
Recovery envelope resolutionHint strings in src/runtime/transitions/recovery.ts are not byte-identical to pre-refactor wording despite preservation requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Unify transition-file LOC policy into one authoritative threshold and require feature descriptions/tests/contracts to reference that exact value.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-transitions-consolidation-r2 review found conflicting limits across AGENTS.md (soft 400), feature text (<=400/<=500 fallback), VAL-TRANS-011 (<=550), and enforcing test (<=550).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit feature-to-commit traceability in handoffs (commit must contain the reviewed diff, or handoff must name the actual introducing commit).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-clone-reduction and m4-recovery-switch reviews observed handoff commit references that did not include the feature's diff, weakening scrutiny traceability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit assertions/tests for toArchiveTimestamp compatibility with ISO inputs lacking milliseconds and for recovery resolutionHint string parity where wording stability is required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-constants-util-merge and m4-recovery-switch passed existing broad checks while specific behavior/string regressions were still possible.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a no-op feature pathway: when work is already implemented, require explicit evidence of no-op justification plus targeted regression tests validating invariants.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-clone-reduction review noted followedProcedure=true handoff without feature-specific implementation evidence; this pattern can bypass test-first intent.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align benchmark guidance with harness reality: either require implementing filter support before using --filter guidance or update the skill to avoid implying filter isolation works today.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-refactor-gate review confirmed bench/index.ts behavior currently runs all suites despite --filter intent.

rejectedObservations.observation: Core-worker test-first compliance concern from m4-constants-util-merge
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific and partially duplicative of the broader no-op/traceability guidance; handled via systemic skill recommendations above

rejectedObservations.observation: Traceability concerns reported separately in m4-clone-reduction and m4-recovery-switch
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; merged into one systemic guidance recommendation on handoff commit traceability
